title: Send an AGV Not in a Task to a Selected Square Using Go-to
summary: Use the Robot Selection Go-to function to send an AGV that is not currently in a task to a selected square. The source provides a short sequence: select the AGV, select Go to, select the destination square, and confirm.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when an AGV is not in a task and needs to be manually sent to a selected square using the Robot Selection Go-to function.
not_for: Do not use this procedure for an AGV that is currently in a task.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Perform the Robot Selection Go-to sequence for an AGV that is not in a task.

safety_notes: The source limits this function to an AGV not in a task.
The source describes this as useful for quick recovery.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Robot Selection screen

access_required: Access to the Robot Selection screen
system_preconditions: The AGV to be moved is not in a task.

visual_references.description: Training slide describing the Robot Selection Go-to function and the step sequence for sending an AGV to a selected square.

steps.title: Open Robot Selection and identify the AGV
steps.purpose: Start from the correct interface and identify the AGV to be moved.
steps.instruction: Open the Robot Selection screen and identify the AGV you want to move.
steps.expected_result: The Robot Selection screen is open and the target AGV has been identified.
steps.healthy_condition: The target AGV is visible in Robot Selection and can be identified for selection.
steps.failure_condition: The Robot Selection screen is unavailable or the target AGV cannot be identified.

actions.label: Open Robot Selection
actions.exact_action: Open the Robot Selection screen and identify the AGV to move.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Robot Selection Go-to slide showing the AGV movement workflow.

stop_or_escalate_if: The Robot Selection screen cannot be accessed.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Training slide describing the Robot Selection "Go-to" function for manually sending an AGV to a selected square.

steps.title: Verify the AGV is not in a task
steps.purpose: Confirm the source-defined condition for using the Go-to function.
steps.instruction: Verify the AGV is not in a task before using Go-to.
steps.expected_result: The AGV is confirmed to be not in a task.
steps.healthy_condition: The AGV is not in a task, matching the source constraint for Go-to use.
steps.failure_condition: The AGV is in a task.

actions.label: Check AGV task state
actions.exact_action: Verify the AGV is not in a task.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Slide text stating that an AGV not in a task can be sent to any square.

stop_or_escalate_if: The AGV is currently in a task.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: An AGV not in a task can be sent to any square.
The slide explicitly limits the Go-to function to AGVs that are not currently in a task.

steps.title: Select the AGV
steps.purpose: Choose the AGV that will receive the Go-to command.
steps.expected_result: The intended AGV is selected in Robot Selection.
steps.healthy_condition: The correct AGV is selected and ready for the next action.
steps.failure_condition: The AGV cannot be selected or the wrong AGV is selected.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Robot Selection Go-to workflow showing AGV selection as the first step.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Steps shown include: select an AGV, select Go to, select which square you want the AGV to go to, and select Confirm.

steps.title: Select Go to
steps.purpose: Open the manual destination action for the selected AGV.
steps.expected_result: The Go-to function is opened for the selected AGV.
steps.healthy_condition: The Go-to option is available and can be selected.
steps.failure_condition: The Go-to option is unavailable or does not open.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Go-to function step in the Robot Selection workflow.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Steps shown include: select an AGV, select Go to, select which square you want the AGV to go to, and select Confirm.

steps.title: Select the destination square
steps.purpose: Choose where the AGV should be sent.
steps.instruction: Select the square you want the AGV to go to.
steps.expected_result: A destination square is selected for the AGV.
steps.healthy_condition: The intended square is selected as the destination.
steps.failure_condition: A destination square cannot be selected or the wrong square is selected.

actions.label: Choose destination square
actions.exact_action: Select which square you want the AGV to go to.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The destination square selection step in the Go-to workflow.

stop_or_escalate_if: The destination square cannot be selected.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Steps shown include: select an AGV, select Go to, select which square you want the AGV to go to, and select Confirm.

steps.title: Confirm the Go-to action
steps.purpose: Submit the selected destination so the AGV is sent to the chosen square.
steps.expected_result: The Go-to action is confirmed and the AGV is sent to the selected square.
steps.healthy_condition: The confirmation is accepted and the AGV begins moving to the chosen square.
steps.failure_condition: Confirmation is unavailable, not accepted, or the AGV does not move after confirmation.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The final Confirm step in the Robot Selection Go-to workflow.

stop_or_escalate_if: The AGV does not move after confirmation.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Steps shown include: select an AGV, select Go to, select which square you want the AGV to go to, and select Confirm.
An AGV not in a task can be sent to any square.

success_criteria: The selected AGV is sent to the chosen square.
The Go-to action is accepted after confirmation.
healthy_conditions: The AGV is not in a task before Go-to is used.
The AGV can be selected in Robot Selection.
A destination square can be selected.
failure_conditions: The AGV is in a task.
The destination square cannot be selected.
The AGV does not move after confirmation.
escalation_guidance: Do not use this procedure if the AGV is in a task, because the source limits the Go-to function to an AGV not in a task.
Escalate if the AGV cannot be selected, the Go-to option is unavailable, or the AGV does not move after confirmation.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Training slide showing the Robot Selection Go-to function, task-state constraint, and step sequence.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: An AGV not in a task can be sent to any square.

missing_details: The source does not provide a time estimate.
The source does not specify permissions beyond access to Robot Selection.
The source does not provide detailed UI indicators for how to verify task state.
The source does not provide additional safety checks, production stop requirements, or LOTO requirements.
